brief: Build a SaaS analytics dashboard with a dark theme. Include KPI cards for Monthly Recurring Revenue ($124K), Churn Rate (2.1%), and Active Users (8,432). Add a line chart showing monthly revenue trend for the last 12 months.

Create a landing page for an AI-powered code review tool called CodeGuard. Hero headline: 'Catch bugs before they ship'. Include feature highlights (Security scanning, Performance analysis, Style enforcement), pricing tiers (Free / Pro $29/mo / Enterprise), and a prominent 'Start free trial' CTA.

Design a product detail page for a luxury skincare serum priced at $89. Show a hero image placeholder, product title 'Lumière Radiance Serum', 5-star rating with 247 reviews, ingredient list, and an Add to Cart button. Include a Trust Badges section (Cruelty-free, Dermatologist tested).

Design a 3-step mobile onboarding flow for a personal finance app. Step 1: Connect your bank (OAuth illustration + 'Connect with Plaid' button). Step 2: Set your monthly budget (input field + category sliders). Step 3: Enable notifications (toggle + permission explanation). Include a progress bar.

Build an admin settings panel for a B2B SaaS platform with 4 tabs: Billing (current plan, payment method, invoice history), Team (member list with role badges, invite button), API Keys (masked key display, generate/revoke actions), Notifications (email toggle matrix). Use a sidebar navigation layout.

Create an e-commerce operations dashboard. Top row: 4 metric cards (Orders today: 142, Revenue: $8,921, Returns: 7, Avg Order Value: $62.8). Main content: Orders table with columns (Order ID, Customer, Product, Amount, Status badge, Actions). Add a Fulfillment Rate donut chart sidebar.

Design a multi-step checkout form: Step 1 (Shipping: name, address, country select), Step 2 (Payment: card number with input mask, expiry, CVV), Step 3 (Review: order summary with line items and total). Include a sticky order summary sidebar. Show step completion checkmarks.

Build a search results page for a legal document platform. Include: a search bar with filter chips (Date range, Document type, Practice area), 8 result cards (title, excerpt, metadata tags, relevance score bar), pagination, and a faceted sidebar with collapsible filter groups.

Create a user profile page for a developer platform. Include: avatar with online indicator, display name + username + join date, bio text, stats row (Repos: 47, Followers: 1.2K, Following: 89, Stars: 3.4K), pinned repositories grid (4 cards with language color badges and star counts), and an activity contribution heatmap placeholder.

Design a landing page for an AI meeting assistant called MeetMind. Hero: 'Every meeting, automatically documented'. Show how it works (3 steps: Join meeting → AI transcribes → Get action items). Include a demo video placeholder, testimonials (3 with avatars), and pricing CTA.

Build a real-time monitoring dashboard for a cloud infrastructure team. Metrics: CPU Usage sparkline (67%), Memory Usage (8.2GB/16GB), Active Alerts (3 critical), P99 Latency (124ms). Include an incident timeline feed, a services health grid (8 services with green/yellow/red status), and a top-5 slow endpoints table.

Create a shopping cart page for a fashion retailer. Show 3 cart items (image thumbnail, name, size/color variants, quantity stepper, price, remove button). Include an order summary sidebar (subtotal, shipping estimate, promo code input, total, checkout button). Add a 'You might also like' section with 4 product cards.

Design a content management dashboard for a publishing platform. Left sidebar navigation: Dashboard, Articles, Media, Categories, Comments, Settings. Main area: Article list table with columns (Title, Author, Category badge, Status pill, Published date, Views, Actions dropdown). Include bulk actions and search.

Build a user registration form for a healthcare patient portal. Fields: Legal name (first, last), Date of birth (date picker), Gender (radio group), Insurance provider (select), Policy number (input with validation), Primary care physician (search autocomplete), Emergency contact (name + phone). Include HIPAA notice.

Design a ride-sharing app home screen for mobile (375px width). Show a map placeholder (full-screen background), a bottom sheet with Where to? search bar, recent destinations (3 rows), and quick-action chips (Work, Home, Grocery). Include a hamburger menu, notification bell, and a floating 'Schedule ride' button.

Create a social media analytics dashboard for a marketing agency. Show: follower growth line chart (Instagram + TikTok + Twitter), engagement rate donut chart, top posts grid (6 posts with thumbnail, platform badge, like/comment/share counts), and a posting schedule calendar for the current week.

Design a waitlist landing page for a new AI coding assistant. Minimal design, one primary action. Hero: large headline 'The AI that ships code, not suggestions', subheadline, and an email capture form with 'Join waitlist' CTA. Show social proof: '12,847 developers already waiting'. Add feature preview screenshot placeholder.

Design a 404 error page for a developer platform. Include the Atelier logo, a large '404' typographic treatment, message: 'This page took a different fork', a brief explanation, navigation links back (Home, Documentation, Status Page), and a search bar for the user to find what they're looking for.

Build a project management Kanban board UI. Columns: Backlog (8 cards), In Progress (3 cards), In Review (2 cards), Done (12 cards). Card content: title, assignee avatar, priority badge (P0/P1/P2), story points, due date. Include column headers with card counts, and a 'Add card' button in each column.

Design a food delivery order tracking screen for mobile. Show order status timeline: Order placed ✓ → Restaurant confirmed ✓ → Being prepared (active) → Out for delivery → Delivered. Include a map placeholder showing driver location, estimated time '18 min', restaurant info, and order summary expandable section.

Create a billing management page for a SaaS startup. Show: Current plan card (Pro, $99/mo, renews June 1), Usage meters (API calls: 847K/1M, Storage: 23GB/100GB, Seats: 7/10), Payment methods list (Visa ending 4242, add new), Invoice history table (last 6 months with download links), and a Downgrade/Upgrade plan section.

Design a jobs search results page for a tech hiring platform. Search bar at top with location filter. Show 6 job listing cards: company logo placeholder, role title, company name, location badges (Remote/Hybrid), salary range, tech stack tags (React, Python, etc.), application deadline, and Save/Apply buttons.

Build a developer documentation landing page for an API platform. Top nav with logo, docs link, changelog, GitHub, and Sign In. Hero: 'The API that powers modern apps'. Show 4 code snippet tabs (cURL, Python, JavaScript, Go) with syntax highlighting placeholder. Include a 'Get API key' CTA and a feature comparison table.

Create an AI model training dashboard. Show: active training run with real-time loss curve chart (training loss vs validation loss), batch progress bar (Epoch 3/10, Step 847/1000), hyperparameter summary card (LR: 2e-4, Batch: 32, Model: gemini-2.5-flash-001), GPU utilization sparklines for 4 GPUs, and early stopping controls.

Design a personal finance summary screen for a mobile banking app (375px). Top: account balance ($12,847.32) with masked/unmask toggle. Recent transactions list (5 items: merchant name, category icon, amount, date). Quick actions row: Transfer, Pay, Save, Invest. Monthly spending breakdown mini-chart. Chatbot FAB button.
